description: A sound mixer needs the final audio tracks for a scene to begin the mixing process.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all separated audio tracks (dialogue, effects, music) for the specified scene.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all the individual audio stems.

nodes.task_description: Package the audio tracks into a standardized format (e.g., AAF) for the mixing software.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully exports an AAF file.

nodes.task_description: Deliver the AAF package to the sound mixer.
